text: ‘Like the men who went before them’; the Hebrew text more probably means ‘from the east’. But the whole of the verse is very obscure, and perhaps corrupt.

This verse seems to be addressed to the false gods. But the Hebrew text is best translated, ‘Cease from man, whose breath is in his nostrils; what claim has he to regard?’ The sense is not clear, and the Septuagint Greek omits the whole verse.
